top_signals.title: Bond Yield Surge Poses Threat to AI-Fueled Asian Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: Rising US bond yields pose a threat to Asia’s stock rally, as growing inflation fears offset ongoing optimism over benefits from the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Slide, Oil Swings on Iran Uncertainty | The Asia Trade 5/19/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hungary’s Peter Magyar visits Poland on first trip abroad as PM seeking EU reset
top_signals.summary: The Hungarian leader's trip is rich in symbolism as he seeks to steer his nation back towards the European mainstream.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
